prompts.prompt: Tolman Cotton, 'Farmer Cotton' — a male hobbit, a Hobbit of the Shire, of the Cotton; a round rosy beardless face, curly hair, bright kind eyes, slightly pointed ears, small stature; a warm, cheerful, homely expression. (The corpus gives no explicit portrait; features are race-typical and inferred.) Draw this in a loose, expressive, hand-drawn fantasy-illustration style — the style governs only the medium, never the character's described features: confident sketchy ink linework with visible construction lines and varied line weight; soft slightly-desaturated cel-shading (one mid-tone, one darker shadow, one lighter highlight); simple consistent directional light; a single character bust — head and shoulders, one face, centered, mostly 3/4 view — on a plain flat white background, no scenery, no props, no text, no labels. A single centered bust of one male hobbit only — one face, plain white background, no text, no labels.
